history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, high-contrast, dramatic silhouette of a young person riding a horse on a beach at sunset. The rider, wearing a simple t-shirt and pants, is positioned in the foreground, their form and the horse's body rendered as solid black shapes against the bright sky and sea. The horse is facing left, its head and neck clearly defined by the backlight. Behind them, the ocean stretches out, with gentle waves lapping the shore, reflecting the soft glow of the setting sun. The sun itself is a bright, diffused orb just above the horizon, casting a luminous haze. To the right, a large, dark, tree-covered cliff juts out into the frame, its silhouette also stark against the sky. The sky is filled with dynamic, wispy clouds, adding texture and movement to the scene. The overall mood is serene, contemplative, and slightly melancholic, evoking a sense of peaceful solitude and the beauty of nature. The style is reminiscent of a classic cinematic shot, emphasizing form and light over detail.
